summary.intent: Fix premature token expiration bug in auth module
summary.outcome: Changed token TTL from 1h to 24h to match refresh middleware expectations

repo: Auth tokens use JWT with configurable expiration in src/auth.ts

code.finding: Token expiration must match refresh middleware interval (24h)

workflow: Check refresh logic when changing token TTL

friction: Token TTL was hardcoded instead of configurable
open_items: Consider making token TTL configurable via environment variable
